titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Franklin M. Foote Papers
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday August 19, 2020 at 07:17

did.abstract: Office files, printed matter, and press releases documenting Franklin M. Foote's service as commissioner of the Connecticut State Department of Health (1959-1972), as a member of the Connecticut Clean Air Commission and Air Pollution Control Program (1970-1971), and the Council on Tuberculosis. Included also are a small amount of papers from 1935 and 1936 of Dr. Stanley Hart Osborn who was then commissioner of the Department of Health. These papers form part of the Contemporary Medical Care and Health Policy Collection.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Franklin Manley Foote Papers (MS 848). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Franklin M. Foote: public health physician; B.S., Yale, 1930, M.D., 1933, D.P.H., 1935; chief, division of local health administration, Connecticut State Dept. of Health, 1937-1941; district health officer, New York City, 1941-1946; medical director, later executive director, National Society for the Prevention of Blindness, 1946-1959; commissioner, Connecticut State Dept. of Health, 1959-1973; lecturer in public health and epidemiology, Yale, 1959-.

list.item: Series I. Papers of Dr. Franklin M. Foote, 1959-1972
Series II. Papers of Dr. Franklin M. Foote and Dr. Stanley Hart Osborn, 1935-1936; 1959-1971

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Franklin M. Foote Papers consist of Dr. Foote's files as Commissioner of the Connecticut State Department of Health. Included among the papers are files on state and local public health agencies, commissions, and services, 1959-1960; the Connecticut Clean Air Commission and Air Pollution Control Program, 1970-1971; the Council on Tuberculosis and Control, 1972; and press releases, 1962-1963. Also included are the papers of Dr. Stanley Hart Osborne who served as Commissioner in 1935-1936.
The papers were received from Dr. Franklin M. Foote in 1977.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

title.part: Contemporary Medical Care and Health Policy Collection

did.unittitle: Papers of Dr. Franklin M. Foote

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the period in which he was Commissioner of the Connecticut State Department of Health.

did.unittitle: Administrative files on state and local agencies, commissions, and services related to public health
Administrative files on state and local agencies, commissions, and services related to public health (continued)
News releases of the Connecticut State Department of Health
Files on the Council on Tuberculosis Control
Files on the Connecticut Air Pollution Control Program
Files on the Connecticut Clean Air Commission
Verbatim proceedings of a public hearing on hospital costs before the Connecticut Council on Hospitals
Findings of a Department of Health hearing on the Seaside Regional Center
Papers of Dr. Franklin M. Foote and Dr. Stanley Hart Osborn

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note: The Administrative files of Dr. Franklin M. Foote were organized by subject. The Administrative files of Dr. Stanley Hart Osborn were kept according to a numerical filing system and were reorganized yearly. Only parts of his files for 1935 and 1936 appear in this accession.

did.unittitle: Administrative files of Dr. Foote from his office as Connecticut State Department of Health Commissioner
Comprehensive Health Planning (Some folders are marked PL-89-749. Material relates to the Advisory Council for Comprehensive Health Planning and the many commissions under the Council.)
Conference of Local Directors of Health and Connecticut State Department of Health
Administrative Files of Dr. Stanley Hart Osborn, Commissioner, Connecticut State Department of Health, 1922-?.
150A U.S. - Children (Children's Bureau, U.S. Department of Labor)
157A U.S. - Senate and House of Representatives
98A Publicity - Radio Talks - Lectures, etc. by People Outside of the Department
